be.issep.airquality.Sensors.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for Wallonia ISSeP Air Quality CloudEvents on the `wallonia-issep` topic keyed by `{configuration_id}`.

be.issep.airquality.Sensors.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for Wallonia ISSeP Air Quality CloudEvents using the source topic hierarchy and retain settings declared in this manifest.

be.issep.airquality.Sensors.Amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 producer endpoint for wallonia-issep CloudEvents on the configured broker address.

be.issep.airquality.SensorConfiguration.name: SensorConfiguration
be.issep.airquality.SensorConfiguration.description: A current environmental measurement from Wallonia's Institut Scientifique de Service Public (ISSeP). It carries pollutant concentration measurements when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

be.issep.airquality.Observation.name: Observation
be.issep.airquality.Observation.description: A current environmental measurement from Wallonia's Institut Scientifique de Service Public (ISSeP). It carries pollutant concentration measurements when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

be.issep.airquality.Sensors.description: Events from Wallonia ISSeP Air Quality covering Walloon air-quality monitoring stations. Reference records identify stations, sites, or areas; measurement and forecast records carry the current source data.

be.issep.airquality.Sensors.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of the Wallonia ISSeP Air Quality events. It carries the same source semantics as the base events with MQTT topic routing and retain behavior declared per message.

be.issep.airquality.Sensors.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 variant of the wallonia-issep events. It carries the same reference and telemetry semantics for queue-oriented AMQP consumers and Azure Service Bus.

subject.description: AMQP message subject — stable domain identifier matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

province.description: Routing property copied from the source catalog for AMQP subscription filters and broker-side routing (province).

subject.description: AMQP message subject — stable domain identifier matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

province.description: Routing property copied from the source catalog for AMQP subscription filters and broker-side routing (province).

be.issep.airquality.SensorConfiguration.name: SensorConfiguration
be.issep.airquality.SensorConfiguration.description: Reference event for an ISSeP Wallonia air quality sensor configuration derived from the last-data records. Each distinct id_configuration represents a deployed sensor unit.

schema.name: SensorConfiguration
schema.description: A current environmental measurement from Wallonia's Institut Scientifique de Service Public (ISSeP). It carries pollutant concentration measurements when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

configuration_id.description: Stable numeric identifier of the sensor configuration from the upstream id_configuration field. Converted to string because it serves as the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

province.description: Slug of the Walloon province where the sensor is located (e.g. brabant-wallon, hainaut, liege, luxembourg, namur, or "unknown" sentinel if location is not yet mapped). Matches the {province} MQTT topic axis.

be.issep.airquality.Observation.name: Observation
be.issep.airquality.Observation.description: Telemetry event for one air quality observation from a Wallonia ISSeP sensor. Contains pollutant concentrations, particulate matter levels, environmental readings, and quality status flags.

schema.name: Observation
schema.description: A current environmental measurement from Wallonia's Institut Scientifique de Service Public (ISSeP). It carries pollutant concentration measurements when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

configuration_id.description: Stable numeric sensor configuration identifier from id_configuration. Matches the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

province.description: Slug of the Walloon province where the sensor is located (e.g. brabant-wallon, hainaut, liege, luxembourg, namur, or "unknown" sentinel if location is not yet mapped). Matches the {province} MQTT topic axis.

moment.description: ISO 8601 observation timestamp from the upstream moment field, e.g. '2026-04-08T09:09:13+02:00'. Preserved as-is from the API response.

co.description: Raw carbon monoxide electrochemical sensor reading in internal units.

no.description: Raw nitric oxide electrochemical sensor reading in internal units.

no2.description: Raw nitrogen dioxide electrochemical sensor reading in internal units. Negative values are valid.

o3no2.description: Raw combined ozone and nitrogen dioxide electrochemical sensor reading in internal units. Negative values are valid.

ppbno.description: Calibrated nitric oxide concentration in parts per billion (ppb).

ppbno_statut.description: Quality status flag for ppbno. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

ppbno2.description: Calibrated nitrogen dioxide concentration in parts per billion (ppb).

ppbno2_statut.description: Quality status flag for ppbno2. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

ppbo3.description: Calibrated ozone concentration in parts per billion (ppb).

ppbo3_statut.description: Quality status flag for ppbo3. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

ugpcmno.description: Calibrated nitric oxide concentration in micrograms per cubic meter (µg/m³).

ugpcmno_statut.description: Quality status flag for ugpcmno. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

ugpcmno2.description: Calibrated nitrogen dioxide concentration in micrograms per cubic meter (µg/m³).

ugpcmno2_statut.description: Quality status flag for ugpcmno2. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

ugpcmo3.description: Calibrated ozone concentration in micrograms per cubic meter (µg/m³).

ugpcmo3_statut.description: Quality status flag for ugpcmo3. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

bme_t.description: Temperature reading from the BME280 environmental sensor in degrees Celsius.

bme_t_statut.description: Quality status flag for bme_t. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

bme_pres.description: Atmospheric pressure reading from the BME280 sensor in Pascals.

bme_pres_statut.description: Quality status flag for bme_pres. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

bme_rh.description: Relative humidity reading from the BME280 sensor as a percentage.

bme_rh_statut.description: Quality status flag for bme_rh. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

pm1.description: Particulate matter concentration for particles under 1 micrometer in µg/m³.

pm1_statut.description: Quality status flag for pm1. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

pm25.description: Particulate matter concentration for particles under 2.5 micrometers in µg/m³.

pm25_statut.description: Quality status flag for pm25. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

pm4.description: Particulate matter concentration for particles under 4 micrometers in µg/m³.

pm4_statut.description: Quality status flag for pm4. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

pm10.description: Particulate matter concentration for particles under 10 micrometers in µg/m³.

pm10_statut.description: Quality status flag for pm10. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

vbat.description: Battery voltage of the sensor unit in Volts.

vbat_statut.description: Quality status flag for vbat. 100 indicates valid, 0 indicates invalid or unavailable.

mwh_bat.description: Battery energy level in milliwatt-hours. Negative values indicate discharge.

co_rf.description: Carbon monoxide reference station comparison value.

no_rf.description: Nitric oxide reference station comparison value.

no2_rf.description: Nitrogen dioxide reference station comparison value.

o3no2_rf.description: Combined ozone and nitrogen dioxide reference station comparison value.

description: Wallonia ISSeP Air Quality publishes pollutant concentration measurements from Wallonia's Institut Scientifique de Service Public (ISSeP) for Walloon air-quality monitoring stations. These events help consumers build monitoring, alerting, analytics, and dashboards without polling the upstream API directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for Wallonia ISSeP Air Quality, including upstream API context and bridge deployment notes.
